codeReview.summary: The fix commit addresses all three prior blocking issues from f5-polish-docs-packaging: Claude Desktop config now uses Streamable HTTP URL form, integration setup guides exist for all six required types, and admin API catch blocks consistently return formatError(error).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature metadata references skillName 'worker', but the corresponding skill file is missing from repo-level skills state.
Mission reviewer guidance expects architecture reference under .factory/library, but architecture.md is absent.
No new service/command gap observed in this fix; worker used existing project validators and did not introduce unmanaged services.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker transcript session `de2f8bdf-eb74-4d20-8919-6c3f2da20b38` shows `npm run build`, `npm test`, `npm run lint`, and file edits/commit only.

summary: Pass. The fix feature fully addresses the original scrutiny blockers: config corrected to `url: http://localhost:3333/mcp`, six docs/integrations guides were added, and admin.ts catch responses were standardized with formatError(). No blocking defects found in the fix diff.
